steps.title: Test the cultural claim
steps.content: Moreau's team says pottery uses differed because of culture, not local food availability. That explanation is strongest if both basins offered similar terrestrial and aquatic resources.

steps.title: Reject resource alternatives
steps.content: The similar-resource finding removes food availability as the obvious cause. If access was similar, the Volga and Don choices cannot be explained simply by one basin having different foods available. B concerns settlement type, C would support a food-availability explanation, and D concerns pottery technique rather than why different foods were stored. The answer is A.
